body:
## Summary
- preserve progress-store read and JSON parse failures as recoverable persistence warnings
- render accessibility/preference persistence warnings on Settings with the existing operation-specific copy
- update content validation to guard the recoverable progress read path

## Validation
- NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH node --test tests/content-storage-write-fail-soft.test.js tests/content-settings-route-copy-parity.test.js tests/content-mistakes-route-copy-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "PersistenceWarningNotice|read warning|write warning|persistence warning|storage"
- NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH npm run typecheck -- --pretty false
- NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH npm run validate:content
- git diff --check origin/main..HEAD
title: storage: preserve recoverable read warnings
